<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>Huh?! Who are you?!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>This is a <Color=red>Hudson Construction <Color=white>site. We're

anywhere else. It's no place for civilians...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Not to mention the falling ruins. Those are
incredibly dangerous—you really shouldn't
be here.

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>！！<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>因此普通人

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>Huh?!<unk[5:1]> You again?!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>Didn't I tell you that this is a <Color=red>Hudson
Construction <Color=white>site. We're doing <Color=red>critical
work <Color=white>that can't be done anywhere else.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Plus, ruins are still falling. Safety first!
This is no place for civilians.

rows.CNzh: 松达建筑店？
rows.TWzh: 松達建築店？
rows.JPja: エノキダ<Ruby={6:10}こうむてん>工務店？
rows.USen: Hudson Construction?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>说起松达建筑店，
那就是建筑行业的专业集团！
他们可不仅仅具备建造<Color=red>监视堡垒<Color=white>那种建筑的水平，
更是能建造像<Color=red>鸟望台<Color=white>这种机关的
能工巧匠们哦！

不过现在最具人气的——
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>說到松達建築店，
那可是建築行業的專業集團啊！
他們不僅能建造出像<Color=red>監視堡壘<Color=white>那種壯觀的建築，
也能打造出像<Color=red>鳥望台<Color=white>一樣具有精密設計的裝置。
是一群超厲害的工匠喔！

不過現在最熱門的──
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>エノキダ<Ruby={6:10}こうむてん>工務店といえば
モノづくりの プロ<Ruby={4:10}しゅうだん>集団！
<Color=red><Ruby={6:12}かんしとりで>監視砦<Color=white>なんかの<Ruby={4:8}たてもの>建物だけじゃなく
<Color=red><Ruby={6:14}ちょうぼうだい>鳥望台<Color=white>みたいなカラクリだって<Ruby={2:4}つく>作っちゃう
スゴイ<Ruby={4:8}ひとたち>人達なんですよ！

でも <Ruby={6:12}いまいちばん>今一番ホットなのは
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Hudson Construction is the number one
construction company!

And they don't only do buildings, like the
ones at <Color=red>Lookout Landing<Color=white>...

They also build machinery, like the
<Color=red>Skyview Towers<Color=white>. Amazing!

And just wait until you hear about their
latest invention...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>就是这个<Color=red>气球<Color=white>了呢！

没想到吧？
这可是用<Color=red>左纳乌装置<Color=white>加工制成的东西！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>就是這個<Color=red>氣球<Color=white>了！

這是用<Color=red>左納烏裝置<Color=white>加工後
製成的東西喔，很驚人吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>この<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}ききゅう>気球<Color=white>ですかね！

なんとなんと <Color=red>ゾナウギア<Color=white>を<Ruby={4:6}かこう>加工して
<Ruby={2:4}つく>作られたものなんです！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>This <Color=red>balloon<Color=white>!


Can you believe it was made using
<Color=red>Zonai devices<Color=white>?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>普尔亚大人对<Color=red>左纳乌装置<Color=white>
兴趣浓厚，
还请松达先生制作了<unk[5:0]>
我们左纳乌调查队专用的气球！
多亏了它，我们的调查范围
又唰地一下扩大了好多呢！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>普爾亞大人
非常關注<Color=red>左納烏裝置<Color=white>，
於是就請松達先生負責打造<unk[5:0]>
左納烏調查隊專用的氣球了！
多虧了這個氣球，
我們的調查範圍一口氣變廣啦！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]><Color=red>ゾナウギア<Color=white>に
<Ruby={4:10}ちゅうもく>注目した プルア<Ruby={2:4}さま>様が
エノキダさんに <Ruby={2:4}たの>頼んで<Ruby={2:4}つく>作ってもらった<unk[5:0]>
ゾナウ<Ruby={8:16}ちょうさたいよう>調査隊用の<Ruby={4:8}ききゅう>気球なんです！
お<Ruby={2:4}かげ>陰で <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私たちの<Ruby={8:14}ちょうさはんい>調査範囲も
ぐーんと <Ruby={2:4}ひろ>広がったんですよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>Purah has taken a keen interest in all the
<Color=red>Zonai devices <Color=white>found here.<PageBreak>So she asked Hudson to make this balloon
for the Zonai Survey Team to use.<PageBreak>Thanks to this thing, the scope of our
research has broadened considerably!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Do you have the capacity to build another

rows.JPja:
